# Tikeo docs for LLMs

Tikeo is a Rust-native distributed task scheduling and workflow orchestration platform. The docs site is the operator-grade manual; README remains only a concise project introduction. Prefer these implementation-verified pages over inferred behavior.

High-value English pages:

- /docs/ — documentation map, reader outcomes, architecture boundary, and evidence-first evaluation path
- /docs/getting-started/installation — toolchain matrix, version baselines, repository surfaces, Owner bootstrap prerequisites, and verification commands
- /docs/getting-started/quickstart — Server + Web + outbound Worker + SDK Management API trigger acceptance runbook
- /docs/deployment/production — production deployment guide for Server/Web/Docs images, external databases, Worker Tunnel networking, TLS/mTLS, observability, backup, rollback, and smoke verification
- /docs/deployment/server-ha — Server HA and cluster modes: Raft single-Leader scheduling ownership, topology diagrams, Worker Tunnel gateway relay, and production verification
- /docs/integrations/sdk-and-api — application integration guide for Worker SDKs, Management API keys, API jobs, triggers, broadcast selectors, task-status notifications, and evidence
- /docs/integrations/migrating-from-legacy-schedulers — review-first tikeo-migrate runbook for XXL-JOB/PowerJob auto-detect, legacy DB export, Java dependency adaptation, dry-run apply, and staged import evidence
- /docs/reference/configuration-cookbook — scenario recipes for database, TLS/mTLS, OIDC, observability, Notification Center delivery, Worker SDK defaults, and release image pinning
- /docs/development/overview — maintainer guide for API/Web/SDK/docs changes, notification provider extension, script sandbox boundaries, and release readiness
- /docs/development/product-readiness-acceptance — release and handoff gates for Notification Center, tikeo-migrate, and Raft FSOD Server HA
- /docs/reference/configuration — complete default-value table, environment overrides, TLS/mTLS, OIDC, observability, alerting, Notification Center delivery, and Worker SDK defaults
- /docs/reference/notification-center — Notification Center API, RBAC, config defaults, storage model, redaction, retry, DLQ, and UI reference
- /docs/concepts/worker-tunnel — outbound-only Worker Tunnel model
- /docs/concepts/workflows — workflow DAG model
- /docs/user-guide/dashboard — Dashboard operations guide
- /docs/user-guide/jobs — Jobs user guide with API trigger and broadcast selector workflow
- /docs/user-guide/instances — Instance result, attempts, and log triage
- /docs/user-guide/workers — Worker Tunnel capacity and lifecycle guide
- /docs/user-guide/workflows — Workflow DAG authoring and runtime triage
- /docs/user-guide/notifications — Notification Center channels, policies, messages, delivery retry, DLQ, UI channel/policy CRUD, and alert boundary
- /docs/user-guide/alerts — Alert rule/event operations, silence/recovery/suppression semantics, and Notification Center boundary
- /docs/user-guide/scripts — Script governance and diff workflow
- /docs/user-guide/audit — Audit evidence and export workflow
- /docs/user-guide/settings — Settings, API-Key, and RBAC governance guide
- /docs/sdks/rust — Rust Worker SDK dependency coordinates, WorkerConfig defaults, Minimal Worker, ManagementClient, and live runbook
- /docs/sdks/go — Go Worker SDK dependency coordinates, WorkerConfig defaults, Minimal Worker, NewManagementClient, and live runbook
- /docs/sdks/java-spring-boot — Java Boot/plain Java/Spring dependency selection, Spring Boot property defaults, @TikeoProcessor, HttpTikeoJobClient, and live runbook
- /docs/sdks/python — Python Worker SDK dependency coordinates, WorkerConfig defaults, Minimal Worker, ManagementClient, and live runbook
- /docs/sdks/nodejs — Node.js Worker SDK dependency coordinates, WorkerConfig defaults, Minimal Worker, ManagementClient, and Bun/Node live runbook
- /docs/deployment/docker-compose — Docker Compose path
- /docs/deployment/kubernetes — Kubernetes and Helm boundaries
- /docs/deployment/kubernetes-controller-runbook — Nginx Ingress, Envoy Gateway, Traefik, Gateway API, TLS/mTLS, and smoke runbook
- /docs/deployment/management-trigger-smoke-runbook — contributor smoke runbook for scripts/management-trigger-e2e-smoke.sh
- /docs/deployment/sse-realtime — SSE proxy, LB, WAF, and Ingress requirements
- /docs/reference/management-openapi — Management OpenAPI reference
- /docs/reference/worker-tunnel-protobuf — Worker Tunnel protobuf reference
- /docs/reference/troubleshooting — troubleshooting

High-value zh-CN pages mirror the critical operator path under /zh-CN/docs/, especially /zh-CN/docs/getting-started/installation, /zh-CN/docs/getting-started/quickstart, /zh-CN/docs/reference/configuration, and /zh-CN/docs/sdks/*.

High-value Chinese pages:

- /zh-CN/docs/deployment/server-ha — Server 高可用与集群模式：Raft 单 Leader 调度所有权、拓扑图、Worker Tunnel gateway relay 和生产验收
- /zh-CN/docs/development/product-readiness-acceptance — 通知中心、tikeo-migrate 和 Raft FSOD Server HA 的发布/交接门槛
- /zh-CN/docs/integrations/migrating-from-legacy-schedulers — 旧调度器迁移指南，覆盖 tikeo-migrate、自动探测、旧库导出、Java 依赖适配、dry-run apply 和预发导入证据

- /zh-CN/docs/user-guide/notifications — 通知中心渠道、策略、消息、重试、DLQ、UI 渠道/策略 CRUD 与告警边界
- /zh-CN/docs/user-guide/alerts — 告警规则/事件、静默/恢复/抑制语义与通知中心边界
- /zh-CN/docs/reference/notification-center — 通知中心 API、RBAC、配置、存储、脱敏、重试和 DLQ 参考
